title: Piénsalo alpha session feedback
description: One record per alpha usage session. Submitted voluntarily by the user; nothing is collected automatically. Records without consent_to_publish=true are never published.

participant_id.description: Anonymous alpha id (e.g. 'alpha-07'). Never a name, email, or handle.

offline.description: True if the session ran with no network access.

model_family.description: As recorded by provenance; 'manual-copy-paste' for skills-only use.

model_id_as_recorded.description: Exact model identifier from provenance output, if runtime was used.

task_description.description: The user's own task, in their words. No secrets, no client-identifying details.

outcome.description: User's overall judgment of the session. 'hurt' triggers a negative-transfer follow-up.

verdict_agreement.description: Did the user agree with each verdict Piénsalo produced?

no_repair_needed_events.description: How many times the system abstained this session.

negative_transfer_suspected.description: True if the user believes any part of the task went worse than it would have without Piénsalo.

negative_transfer_details.description: Required in practice when negative_transfer_suspected is true; reviewed for NEGATIVE-RESULTS.md.

evidence_artifacts.description: Relative paths (within the user's shared bundle) to .piensalo evidence files supporting this report.

consent_to_publish.description: Explicit consent to publish this record (anonymized) in case studies or evidence reports. False means internal triage only.
